features.academicDesc: Manage courses, exams, assignments, and track student progress effectively with our comprehensive academic tools.

features.attendanceDesc: Efficiently track and manage student and staff attendance with automated systems and detailed reports.
features.financeDesc: Handle fees, payments, salaries, and financial reports with our integrated finance module.
